What best describes your production experience at a large enterprise?

options.label: I have shipped and operated a system in a large enterprise (1,000+ employees) including production support.
options.value: I have shipped and operated a system in a large enterprise (1,000+ employees) including production support.

options.label: I have shipped at a large enterprise but did not own production operations.

options.label: I have only shipped in smaller companies or startups.
options.value: I have only shipped in smaller companies or startups.

fields.label: Which best describes your experience with AI agents or agentic workflows?

options.label: I have built and operated agentic systems in production, including testing for non-determinism and failure recovery.
options.value: I have built and operated agentic systems in production, including testing for non-determinism and failure recovery.

options.label: I have built agents in staging or demo environments but not in production.
options.value: I have built agents in staging or demo environments but not in production.

options.label: I have only used off-the-shelf AI tools; I have not built agent systems.
options.value: I have only used off-the-shelf AI tools; I have not built agent systems.
